reasoning: Pentyl 6-deoxy-alpha-L-mannopyranoside is a glycoside where a pentyl (n-amyl) group is attached via an O-glycosidic bond to the anomeric carbon of 6-deoxy-L-mannose (L-rhamnose), making it an O-glycosyl compound. It falls within carbohydrates and carbohydrate conjugates as a monosaccharide glycoside.
